body:
This will close #801 

This shows that the Upwind3rdOrderBiasedProductC2F when used  with stretched grids (defined via `ExponentialStretching`  with variable number of vertical levels (to check the order of convergence)) converges even with better rates than on the Uniform grid (i.e., order 1 Vs 0.5 for the First-order BC and same 2.5 order of convergence for the Third-order one).

title: Upwind3rdOrderBiasedProductC2F: add unit tests with stretched grids
